title: Luacheck Configuration
description: JSON Schema for luacheck .luacheckrc configuration files (top-level option globals).

std.description: The base standard library globals set (e.g. 'lua54', 'min', 'max', 'love'). Standard sets can be combined with '+' and '-'.

globals.description: Defined globals that may be set and accessed. An array of global names.

read_globals.description: Globals that may be accessed but not set. An array of global names.

ignore.description: Warning codes or patterns to ignore.

enable.description: Warning codes or patterns to enable even if disabled by default.

exclude_files.description: Glob patterns of files to exclude from checking.

include_files.description: Glob patterns of files to include in checking.

files.description: Per-file or per-glob configuration overrides, keyed by file path or glob pattern.

max_line_length.description: Maximum allowed line length, or false to disable the line-length check.

max_code_line_length.description: Maximum allowed length of lines ending with code, or false to disable.

max_string_line_length.description: Maximum allowed length of lines within a string, or false to disable.

max_comment_line_length.description: Maximum allowed length of lines within a comment, or false to disable.

max_cyclomatic_complexity.description: Maximum allowed cyclomatic complexity of functions, or false to disable the check.

allow_defined.description: Allow implicitly defining globals by setting them.

allow_defined_top.description: Allow implicitly defining globals by setting them in the top-level scope.

module.description: Limit visibility of implicitly defined globals to their files.

compat.description: Adjust the std set for compatibility across Lua versions and LuaJIT.

unused.description: Detect unused variables, arguments, and loop variables.

unused_args.description: Detect unused arguments and loop variables.

unused_secondaries.description: Detect unused variables set together with used ones.

self.description: Detect unused implicit 'self' arguments of methods.

redefined.description: Detect redefined local variables and arguments.

global.description: Detect accessing or setting undefined globals.

cache.description: Use a cache, optionally at the given path, to speed up subsequent checks.
